name: DRDO Recruitment & Assessment Centre
query: Current DRDO RAC (rac.gov.in) recruitment advertisements for Scientist B or other engineer posts, with application windows and advert numbers. Only official notices.

name: ISRO Careers
query: Current ISRO recruitment advertisements (isro.gov.in careers) for Scientist/Engineer or technical posts with open or upcoming application windows. Only official notices.

name: NTPC Careers
query: Current NTPC (careers.ntpc.co.in) recruitment advertisements with open application windows, especially engineer/executive posts. Only official notices.

name: SBI Careers
query: Current SBI (sbi.bank.in careers) recruitment notices with open application windows: PO, Specialist Cadre Officer, clerks. Only official notices.

name: RBI Opportunities
query: Current RBI (opportunities.rbi.org.in) vacancies with open or upcoming application windows: Grade B, Assistant, lateral recruitment. Only official notices.

name: UPPSC (Uttar Pradesh PSC)
query: Current UPPSC (uppsc.up.nic.in) recruitment notifications with open application windows: PCS, Computer Assistant, technical and management posts. Only official notices.

name: UPSC What's New
query: Current UPSC (upsc.gov.in) recruitment advertisements with open application windows on the ORA portal (upsconline). Only official notices, not exam results.

name: NABARD Careers
query: Current NABARD (nabard.org) recruitment notifications, especially Grade A Assistant Manager, with application windows. Only official notices.

name: SEBI Recruitment
query: Current SEBI (sebi.gov.in) recruitment notifications, especially Grade A Officer, with application windows. Only official notices.

name: Staff Selection Commission
query: Latest recruitment notifications and exam notices posted on ssc.gov.in (Staff Selection Commission, India) in the last 30 days, especially SSC JE, CGL, and any notice with an open application window. Only official SSC notices.

name: Railway Recruitment Boards
query: Latest Railway Recruitment Board (RRB) India CEN notifications with open or upcoming application windows on rrbapply.gov.in or regional RRB sites, especially Junior Engineer, NTPC, ALP. Only official notifications.

name: IBPS
query: Latest IBPS (ibps.in) recruitment notifications with open application windows: CRP SO Specialist Officer, PO, Clerk. Include application start and end dates. Only official IBPS notices.

name: PSU sweep (BEL / HAL / IOCL / GAIL / PowerGrid / BHEL / ONGC)
query: Recruitment notifications currently open for applications at Indian PSUs: BEL, HAL, IOCL, GAIL, Power Grid, BHEL, ONGC, SAIL — for graduate engineers or management/IT roles. Include closing dates and the official careers URL of each company. Only official PSU notifications, not exam-prep sites' speculation.

name: Regulators & misc (LIC / EPFO / NIC / state PSCs)
query: Indian government recruitment notifications currently open or announced in the last 30 days from: LIC (AAO/ADO), EPFO, NIC/NIELIT, SEBI, IRDAI, PFRDA, and major state PSCs (UPPSC, BPSC, MPPSC, MPSC, RPSC, HPSC) — for graduates or engineers, management and IT roles. Include application windows and official URLs.
